mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reflection_comments WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reflection_comments(id, reflection_id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(gen_random_uuid(), #{reflectionId}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE reflection_comments SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reflection_comments WHERE reflection_id = #{reflectionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reflection_comments WHERE reflection_id = #{reflectionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reflection_comments WHERE reflection_id = #{reflectionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND ( (user_id = #{userA} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reflection_comments rc2 WHERE rc2.reflection_id = reflection_comments.reflection_id AND rc2.user_id = #{userB} AND rc2.deleted_at IS NULL )) OR (user_id = #{userB} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reflection_comments rc2 WHERE rc2.reflection_id = reflection_comments.reflection_id AND rc2.user_id = #{userA} AND rc2.deleted_at IS NULL )) )
